generated_oml:
instance InternalTemperatureSensor1 : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "DS18S20 High-Precision 1-Wire Digital Thermometer for internal temperature measurement with ±0.5°C accuracy"
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureDataTransmitted
]

instance InternalTemperatureSensor2 : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "DS18S20 High-Precision 1-Wire Digital Thermometer for internal temperature measurement with ±0.5°C accuracy"
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureDataTransmitted
]

instance ExternalTemperatureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "DS18S20 High-Precision 1-Wire Digital Thermometer for external temperature measurement with ±0.5°C accuracy"
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureDataTransmitted
]

instance Heatbed : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "214×214×3 mm heatbed controlled via MOSFETs and optocouplers to handle 4A current"
]

instance Fan : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "12V/24V fan with 0.02 m³/s airflow"
]

instance StyrofoamBox : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Styrofoam box with 0.03 m³ air volume as insulated container"
]

instance RaspberryPi4Component : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Raspberry Pi 4 Model B controller for hardware control"
]

instance CustomPCB : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Custom PCB with MOSFETs and optocouplers for current isolation"
]

instance PowerSupply : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Power supply for thermal incubator system"
]

instance ThermalIncubatorSystem : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Thermal incubator system"
    base:contains StyrofoamBox, Heatbed, Fan, RaspberryPi4Component, CustomPCB, PowerSupply, InternalTemperatureSensor1, InternalTemperatureSensor2, ExternalTemperatureSensor
]

instance TemperatureDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom InternalTemperatureSensor1, InternalTemperatureSensor2, ExternalTemperatureSensor
]

instance RawTemperatureData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Raw temperature data from three DS18S20 sensors"
    DTDFVocab:fromData TemperatureDataTransmitted
]

instance CalibratedTemperatureData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Calibrated temperature data from DS18S20 sensors using non-linear least squares optimization in Python Scipy to minimize residual error"
    DTDFVocab:fromData TemperatureDataTransmitted
]

instance ModelA : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulation model with 2 parameters assuming uniform heat distribution and no heatbed thermal inertia"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TemperaturePredictionService, CalibrationService
]

instance ModelB : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulation model with 4 parameters accounting for heatbed thermal dynamics"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TemperaturePredictionService, CalibrationService
]

instance TemperaturePredictionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Simulation models for temperature prediction using Model A and Model B"
    DTDFVocab:provides TemperaturePredictionInsight
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring for safety violations and optimal performance"
    DTDFVocab:provides SafetyViolationDetection, OptimalPerformanceMonitoring
]

instance CalibrationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Calibration algorithms for parameter optimization using non-linear least squares optimization"
    DTDFVocab:provides ModelCalibrationInsight
]

instance BangBangControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Bang-bang control logic for temperature regulation based on sensor feedback"
    DTDFVocab:provides TemperatureRegulationAction
]

instance DigitalTwinCodeManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Code repository management service for digital twin development"
    DTDFVocab:provides CodeRepositoryInsight
]

instance TemperaturePredictionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predicted temperature values from simulation models"
]

instance SafetyViolationDetection : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Detection of safety violations based on temperature deviations"
]

instance OptimalPerformanceMonitoring : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Monitoring for optimal thermal incubator performance"
]

instance ModelCalibrationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight that model parameters have been calibrated to minimize residual error"
]

instance TemperatureRegulationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatic adjustment of heating or cooling via bang-bang control logic"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance CodeRepositoryInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight that code is version controlled in GitHub repository"
]

instance RabbitMQ : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "RabbitMQ message broker for communication between Raspberry Pi and digital twin components"
    DTDFVocab:enables TemperaturePredictionService, RealTimeMonitoringService, CalibrationService, BangBangControlService, DigitalTwinCodeManagementService
]

instance PythonScipy : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python Scipy library for non-linear least squares optimization"
    DTDFVocab:enables CalibrationService
]

instance OneWireBusProtocol : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "1-Wire bus protocol for sensor communication"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService
]

instance GitHubEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "GitHub for open-source code repository management"
    DTDFVocab:enables DigitalTwinCodeManagementService
]

instance HardwareControlEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Raspberry Pi 4 Model B for hardware control operations"
    DTDFVocab:enables BangBangControlService, RealTimeMonitoringService
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control commands (e.g., heatbed on/off, fan speed adjustments) are sent from the controller to the low-level driver via RabbitMQ messages, which then actuates the heatbed and fan through the PCB's MOSFETs and optocouplers."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "A system where the physical twin (incubator hardware) communicates with the digital twin via RabbitMQ server; the digital twin includes a controller for logic, low-level driver for hardware abstraction, simulation models, and monitoring services, with information flow between components as shown in Fig. 7."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The digital twin integrates models used during system deployment, covering the 'as operated' phase of the physical twin's lifecycle for real-time monitoring and control."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Model B showed higher fidelity in predicting thermal inertia of the heatbed through experimental validation; temperature uniformity tested via three sensors with max 7°C discrepancy (reduced to 6°C at 18V fan voltage), and parameters optimized via Scipy's least-squares solver to minimize residual error."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "RabbitMQ message broker using AMQP protocol for communication between physical and virtual components; Raspberry Pi hosts RabbitMQ server and handles all data exchange via publish-subscribe messaging."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "RabbitMQ server, controller, low-level driver, and simulation models are deployed on a single Raspberry Pi 4 Model B, with all components co-located for minimal latency."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "Low-level driver incorporates a safe protocol to maintain device safety; MOSFETs and optocouplers isolate control signals from high-current actuation to prevent electrical hazards, though cybersecurity specifics are not addressed."
]
